creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
Rong-En Fan wrote:
> Please make sure all ports are fetchable. At least, this 
> does not work for my ports:
> 
> devel/p5-VCP-Dest-svk
> devel/pushmi
> 
> Regards,
> Rong-En Fan
pushmi and p5-VCP-Dest-svk are both fetchable via ftp.FreeBSD.org
which I didn't quite catch during the testing I ran because it was 
automated.  I only went back and reverted the ports that didn't have 
distfiles.

I'm very tempted to see if we can get Andreas J. Koenig, who I know from 
mod_perl work,  to help with this.

I guess the solution is do this again, but remove ftp.freebsd.org from 
MASTER_SITES_PERL_CPAN


--
